title: Pdf export cuts off information
excerpt: When exporting to pdf from a dashboard, a lot of the information is cut off based on how the widget displays in monday.com. e.g. if the info is not visible on screen, it doesn’t make the pdf, however is available in mond…

posts.author: blangt (Bonnie Langtree)
posts.cookedHtml: When exporting to pdf from a dashboard, a lot of the information is cut off based on how the widget displays in monday.com. e.g. if the info is not visible on screen, it doesn’t make the pdf, however is available in monday.com as you can scroll in many widgets. I need an option to pull out a complete pdf of everything in every widget otherwise the dashboard as a reporting tool is not useful. I would need to manually show it to executives on screen and can’t leave the report with them as they are not monday.com users, and the report should be point in time (i.e. based on export date).

posts.author: Aleah (Aleah Mua'e)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree. This needs to be fixed.
